summary: Gouvernance & Revue de Direction Module (ARS 1000 clauses 5.1, 5.2, 5.3, 9.3) - Complete Testing. All 23 backend API tests PASSED. All 4 frontend pages verified working with proper UI elements, modals, and integrations.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend gouvernance.py is well-structured with 7 ARS 1000 positions pre-defined (RESP_SMCD, COACH_FORMATEUR, CHARGE_RISQUES_TE, CHARGE_ENCADREMENT, CHARGE_DURABILITE, DIRECTION, RESP_TRACABILITE)
Position assignment uses upsert pattern for idempotent updates
Politique workflow: brouillon -> validee -> diffusee with history tracking
Revue de direction auto-populates module data from PDC, Tracabilite, Formation, Audit modules via _fetch_module_data()
PDF exports use reportlab with proper styling for both organigramme and revue direction
Dashboard correctly computes conformite_globale from postes, politiques, and revues metrics
Alerts generated for vacant positions and missing politiques/revues
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
QuickActionsPanel correctly includes 'Gouvernance' section with 4 items (Dashboard, Organigramme, Politique, Revue direction)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple postes assignments, politiques, and revues during testing. Integration test created full workflow with position assignment, politique creation/validation/diffusion, and revue creation/validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gouvernance module fully tested. 7 ARS 1000 positions defined. Current state: 3/7 postes pourvus, 6 politiques (3 diffusees), 8 revues (2 validees). Rate limiter may block after 30 attempts - restart backend to clear.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/postes: PASSED - Returns 7 ARS 1000 positions with code, titre, clause, description, responsabilites, competences, niveau
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/organigramme: PASSED - Returns positions with assignment status, stats (total, pourvus, vacants)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/gouvernance/organigramme/{code}: PASSED - Assigns person to position with upsert
backend_endpoints.POST /api/gouvernance/politique: PASSED - Creates politique with statut=brouillon, diffusee=false
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/politique: PASSED - Returns politiques list sorted by created_at desc
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/gouvernance/politique/{id}: PASSED - Updates politique with history tracking
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/gouvernance/politique/{id}/diff: PASSED - Marks politique as diffusee, sets statut=validee
backend_endpoints.POST /api/gouvernance/revue-direction: PASSED - Creates revue with auto-populated module data (PDC, Tracabilite, Formation, Audit)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/revue-direction/{id: PASSED - Returns revue detail with entrees, donnees_modules, sorties
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/dashboard: PASSED - Returns KPIs, alertes, module_data, derniere_revue
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gouvernance/revue-direction/{id: PASSED - Exports revue as PDF with reportlab

frontend_pages./cooperative/gouvernance: PASSED - Dashboard with KPIs (postes pourvus, politiques, revues, conformite globale), alerts for vacant positions, module data (PDC, Tracabilite, Formation, Audit), derniere revue, quick actions
frontend_pages./cooperative/gouvernance/organigramme: PASSED - Organigramme with Direction/Operationnel sections, 7 position cards, progress bar, edit modal with form fields, PDF export button
frontend_pages./cooperative/gouvernance/politique: PASSED - Politiques list with status badges (Diffusee/Validee/Brouillon), create modal, edit button, diffuser button for validated policies
frontend_pages./cooperative/gouvernance/revue: PASSED - Revues list with entrees/donnees_modules/sorties sections, create modal with clause 9.3 structure, validate button, PDF button

frontend_interactions.Dashboard navigation buttons: PASSED - Organigramme, Politique, Revue direction all navigate correctly
frontend_interactions.Organigramme edit modal: PASSED - Opens with form fields (nom, email, telephone, date, notes), save button works
frontend_interactions.Politique create modal: PASSED - Opens with form fields (titre, contenu, date_validation, validee_par, pv_ag_reference)
frontend_interactions.Politique diffuser button: PASSED - Visible for validated policies, triggers diffusion
frontend_interactions.Revue create modal: PASSED - Opens with 3 sections (Elements d'entree, Donnees des modules pre-remplies, Elements de sortie)
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel: PASSED - Contains 'Gouvernance' section with 4 items (Dashboard, Organigramme, Politique, Revue direction)
